reasoning_model_2: Model 2 generates audio that is content-accurate and highly natural. Crucially, it effectively adheres to the user's specific command to apply 'heavy stress' on 'very'. model_comparison: Both models achieve high marks for content accuracy and fluency, producing natural-sounding speech. In contrast, Model 2 utilizes a slower pace and distinct emphasis (inferred from the longer duration of the target phrase) to make the word 'very' stand out significantly.
